# Pixel8 Multimedia

## Summary
Pixel8 Multimedia is a UK-based premium pop culture wall art studio and bespoke photo transformation service. We create canvas prints, poster prints, and custom commissions inspired by pop culture, music, film, sport, and modern design across 10+ distinctive art styles.

## Brand
- **Name:** Pixel8 Multimedia
- **Tagline:** Pop. Art. Motion.
- **Parent Company:** The Metavision Multimedia Limited
- **Location:** Southend-on-Sea, Essex, United Kingdom
- **Website:** https://pixel8multimedia.co.uk
- **Delivery:** UK and worldwide

## Products

### Wall Art (Our Way)
All artwork is produced in-house and made to order. Available in three formats and three sizes:

**Formats:**
- Poster Print — sleek, high-definition matte finish ready for framing
- Canvas (Standard Frame) — classic wrapped edge for a clean, modern look
- Canvas (Gallery Frame) — deep-edge premium presentation with added depth

**Sizes:**
- Small — 12×8 inches / 12×12 inches
- Medium — 16×12 inches / 16×16 inches
- Large — 24×16 inches / 20×20 inches

**Pricing:**
- Poster Prints: from £9.99 (Small) to £16.99 (Large)
- Canvas Standard Frame: from £27.99 (Small) to £44.99 (Large)
- Canvas Gallery Frame: from £39.99 (Small) to £64.99 (Large)

### Art Style Collections
1. Neon Glow — electric neon lighting meets pop culture icons
2. Minimalist Cool — stripped back, sleek, sophisticated
3. Retro Vibes — warm tones, grainy textures, vintage aesthetics
4. Pixel Art — 8-bit and 16-bit inspired renditions
5. Abstract Burst — explosive colour fields and dynamic brushstrokes
6. Pop Art — Warhol-inspired halftones and bold repetition
7. Watercolour — soft washes, delicate blooms, painterly edges
8. Noir — high-contrast black and white, cinematic atmosphere
9. Geometric — faceted planes, tessellating shapes, low-poly
10. Street Art — spray paint textures, graffiti energy, urban power

## Custom Services (Your Way)

### Photo Restoration
AI-enhanced technology combined with human artistry to restore, repair, and revitalise old or damaged photographs.
- Standard Restoration: from £25
- Advanced Restoration: from £45
- Full Reconstruction: from £75

### Stills to Reels
Signature service transforming static images into dynamic, cinematic animations.
- Basic Animation: from £35
- Standard Animation: from £55
- Premium Animation: from £85

### Bespoke Commission
Fully custom pop culture artwork tailored to client briefs.
- Pricing: from £45

## Shipping
- UK standard delivery: 3-5 working days
- Free UK delivery on orders over £50
- International delivery: 7-14 working days

## Contact
- Email: hello@pixel8multimedia.co.uk
- Social: Facebook, Instagram, X (Twitter), TikTok
